title: Home Alone
description: A 1990 comedy film starring Macaulay Culkin that follows a left behind child fending off burglars from his family residence. The movie is considered by many to be a staple Christmas watch.

title: Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson
description: American-Canadian actor, businessman and retired professional wrestler known for his roles in the “Fast and Furious” franchise and “Jumanji”. Originally he chose “Flex Kavana” as his stage name but this was later changed by WWE officials.

title: The Elephant in the Room
description: An idiom used to describe an important or controversial issue that is obvious, but that no-one wants to discuss. It originates from a fable in which a man goes to a museum and notes lots of small things but fails to notice a large trunked mammal.

title: Clark Kent Without Glasses
description: A regular man that looks suspiciously like Superman.

title: Sus
description: Internet slang for sketchy or untrustworthy behaviour, made famous by the massively viral online game Among Us. It entered the Oxford English Dictionary in 2022, completing its unlikely journey from gaming chat to official vocabulary.

title: Shaking a Polaroid Picture
description: The instinct to wave a freshly developed instant photo through the air, famously referred to by an OutKast song. The manufacturer has officially asked people to stop doing this, as it can actually damage the developing image.

title: Double Dipping
description: The socially frowned-upon act of biting a snack and plunging it back into the communal sauce. The concept was popularised in an episode of 'Seinfeld' with George Costanza being called out for the practice.

title: Paris Hilton
description: American socialite and businesswoman who rose to fame by starring in the reality television series “The Simple Life”. In 2004 she successfully trademarked her popular quote “That’s hot”. That’s hot!™

title: The Uno Reverse Card
description: A component in a popular family game that flips the direction of play. It might be the only rule in the game that stays consistent over the thousands of different variants people play with.

title: Baby Shark
description: Children's song about a family of large marine fish going hunting, which went viral and has amassed over 13 billion views on YouTube. Its appeal comes from its simple and catchy lyrics: “doo doo doo doo doo doo”.
